_comment4: Attach this policy to the IAM user/role used by Jenkins.
_comment5: Replace ACCOUNT_ID and REGION with actual values.
_comment6: Principle: grant ONLY what the pipeline needs, nothing more.

Statement._comment: ECR — authenticate, push, pull, describe images
Statement._why: GetAuthorizationToken cannot be scoped to a specific repository. It generates a temporary Docker login token.
Scoped to the specific ECR repository. Allows full image push/pull lifecycle.

Statement._comment: EC2 — describe instances for health checks and metadata
Statement._why: Describe actions cannot be scoped to specific resources in AWS (they return lists). Read-only — cannot modify infrastructure.

Statement._comment: CloudWatch Logs — publish pipeline and application logs
Statement._why: Scoped to the project log group prefix. Allows writing logs from Jenkins and the application.

Statement._comment: SSM Parameter Store — read secrets (no access keys in code)
Statement._why: Scoped to the project namespace. Jenkins and the app read DB passwords, API keys from SSM instead of environment variables.
Required to decrypt SSM SecureString parameters. Condition restricts KMS use to SSM service only.
